_meta.source: BF6 retail EBX dumps (common + Aftermath superbundles)

assumed.flipbook_fps: playback rate is a baked shader constant; the player uses frames/lifetime looped
assumed.override_semantics: spawn_rate/lifetime/max_count override fields identified by value anchoring (rate*lifetime<=1.5*max holds for 821/1335 looping emitters; burst emitters exceed it by design)
assumed.particle_size: not present in EBX (lives in baked compute shaders); see editor_fx_params.json class_defaults
